posts.title: 7 Design Principles for a High-Impact Exhibition Stand
posts.excerpt: What separates a stand that gets remembered from one that gets walked past? Here are the seven core principles we apply to every project.
posts.content: Exhibition stands are temporary spaces with permanent consequences. The impression your brand makes at a trade show can shape relationships, generate leads, and build credibility for months after the event.
posts.author: Approach Media

posts.title: How to Plan Your Exhibition Timeline: A Complete Guide
posts.excerpt: Most brands leave too little time for stand design and fabrication. Here's a practical month-by-month timeline to ensure your next exhibition is seamless.
posts.content: The most common mistake exhibitors make is underestimating lead time.
posts.author: Approach Media

posts.title: Double Decker Stands: When Do They Make Sense?
posts.excerpt: A double-decker stand is a serious investment. We break down when it's worth it, what challenges to anticipate, and how to make the most of the elevated space.
posts.content: Double-decker stands are the most visible presence on any exhibition floor.
posts.author: Approach Media

posts.title: Exhibition Stand Design for the Pharma Industry: What Works
posts.excerpt: Pharmaceutical brands face unique challenges at exhibitions. Here's how we approach pharma stand design.
posts.content: Pharma stands must balance clinical credibility with genuine visitor engagement.
posts.author: Approach Media

posts.title: ACETECH 2025 Highlights: Trends We Noticed on the Floor
posts.excerpt: ACETECH is one of India's most competitive exhibition environments for stand design. Here are the design trends that stood out.
posts.content: Every edition of ACETECH raises the bar for exhibition stand design.
